# partialRights

**Type Property**

A flag that permits the Security Server to grant rights on an individual basis.

## Declaration

```swift
static var partialRights: AuthorizationFlags { get }
```

## Discussion

If this and the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationFlags/extendRights] flags are set, the Security Server grants or denies rights on an individual basis and all rights are checked.
title: partialRights
